params.label: Suffix
params.tip: Output column suffix → regions.<suffix> and obsm['X_umap.<suffix>']. Keeps multiple region runs side by side.

params.label: Population basis
params.tip: The populations that define the neighbourhood composition — “what cell types surround each cell”. May span segmentations (e.g. B cells + T cells): they are pooled into one spatial graph. Need at least two.

params.label: Graph type
params.tip: How the neighbourhood graph is built (squidpy). Delaunay pruned by radius, kNN, or fixed radius.

params.label: Radius (µm)
params.tip: Neighbourhood radius in microns (fixed-radius graph + Delaunay pruning).

params.label: k (neighbours)
params.tip: Number of nearest neighbours for the kNN graph.

params.label: Clustering
params.tip: Leiden (data-driven number of regions, set by resolution) or k-means (fixed number of regions).

params.label: Resolution
params.tip: Leiden resolution — higher gives more, smaller regions.

params.label: Integrate across samples
params.tip: Batch-correct the composition across images (Harmony on the sample/uID) before clustering, so region identities are comparable across a cohort instead of confounded by per-sample batch effects. Leiden only.

params.label: Calculate UMAP
params.tip: Also compute a UMAP of the composition vectors (obsm['X_umap.<suffix>']) for plotting.
